title: The Project Management Lifecycle and Its Importance
description: A flowchart illustrating the cyclical phases of a software project and how effective project management mitigates risks to ensure project success.
elements: Common Project Risks (Scope Creep, Budget Overruns, Missed Deadlines, Low Quality)
relationships: Project Management processes (Initiation, Planning, Execution, etc.) flow sequentially and cyclically to achieve Project Success
Project Management acts as a shield, preventing Common Project Risks from impacting the project lifecycle
